author: Zijian Chen, Xueguang Ma, Shengyao Zhuang, Ping Nie, Kai Zou, Andrew Liu, Joshua Green, Kshama Patel, Ruoxi Meng, Mingyi Su, Sahel Sharifymoghaddam, Yanxi Li, Haoran Hong, Xinyu Shi, Xuye Liu, Nandan Thakur, Crystina Zhang, Luyu Gao, Wenhu Chen, Jimmy Lin

readme.entry: - **[BrowseComp-Plus: A More Fair and Transparent Evaluation Benchmark of Deep-Research Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.06600)** — Zijian Chen, Xueguang Ma, Shengyao Zhuang, Ping Nie, Kai Zou, Andrew Liu, Joshua Green, Kshama Patel, Ruoxi Meng, Mingyi Su, Sahel Sharifymoghaddam, Yanxi Li, Haoran Hong, Xinyu Shi, Xuye Liu, Nandan Thakur, Crystina Zhang, Luyu Gao, Wenhu Chen, Jimmy Lin — <https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.06600> · *paper/benchmark/dataset/code* — Deep-research benchmark derived from BrowseComp that replaces live opaque search with a fixed curated corpus and retriever-level judgments. 🆕

factuality.reason: structured evidence plus fetched source snapshot

quality.reason: concrete eval artifacts or methodology signals present

recency.reason: evidence indicates 2025-2026 or actively updated source

section: ## 6 · Benchmark vs. eval (and benchmark integrity: contamination, saturation, label errors, leaderboard gaming)
source_seam: hf papers + GitHub benchmark/tool discovery + arXiv
title: BrowseComp-Plus: A More Fair and Transparent Evaluation Benchmark of Deep-Research Agent

worker.candidate_reason: Clears the bar because it directly addresses benchmark fairness and reproducibility for browsing/deep-research agents with a fixed corpus, human-verified supporting documents, qrels, run-file format, retrieval-only metrics, leaderboard, and reproducible evaluation scripts.
worker.evidence: Retrieved HF paper metadata for 2508.06600, arXiv abstract, texttron/BrowseComp-Plus README, and GitHub repo metadata. Evidence: fixed roughly 100K-document corpus; human-verified supporting documents and challenging negatives; evaluates deep-research agents and retrievers separately; provides dataset, project page, leaderboard, qrels, custom retriever docs, run evaluation script, trajectory downloads; GitHub search found texttron/BrowseComp-Plus with 311 stars and pushed 2026-05-28.
worker.summary: Deep-research benchmark derived from BrowseComp that replaces live opaque search with a fixed curated corpus and retriever-level judgments.
